name: Chicken Saute a La Creole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into serving size pieces.
2. Place flour, salt, and pepper in a shaker bag and evenly coat the chicken.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat and brown the chicken evenly. When the chicken is browned, remove it and set aside, keeping it warm.
4. Pour off 2 tablespoons of chicken drippings.
5. Add the drippings, onions, and peppers to a large skillet and cook over low heat until the onion is tender.
6. Add tomatoes, garlic, and basil. Stir in the chicken and cover.
7. Simmer for 30 to 40 minutes or until the chicken is tender. Stir the sauce occasionally.
